name: api-automation-framework
description: AI-powered API automation framework using Postman, Newman, and GitHub Actions for scalable API testing and CI/CD workflows.

scripts.test:dev: newman run collections/bookings-api.collection.json -e environments/dev.environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/dev-report.html
scripts.test:test: newman run collections/bookings-api.collection.json -e environments/test.environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/test-report.html
scripts.test:ci: newman run collections/bookings-api.collection.json -e environments/test.environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/ci-report.html

author: Senior QA Automation Engineer
